2301770.name: Ven'rif
2301770.description:
A CASUAL REAL-TIME STRATEGY GAME Summon unique creatures, cast explosive spells, survive the assassination! Ven'rif is a casual real-time strategy card game where you build a deck of collectible cards and fight against another player on the battlefield. Ven'rif simplifies what other real-time strategy games can't all the while retaining the depth of the gameplay at a cheap expense of a shorter playtime.

Objectives:

  • Kill the opposing avatar (Winning),

  • Destroy as much totems before the timer runs out (Winning),

  • Gather the right resources to use your cards,

  • Do side quests to get more resources,

Features:

  • With over 80 cards to build around your deck,

  • Multiplayer 1v1,

  • Casual controls (use cards, trade resources, enchantcards)
2301770.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
